en: How’s the weather today?

ab: a kalevelevan pasu ljaljeqel, temekel itjen tua linalja a zaljum.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.
How’s the weather today?

ab: a kalevelevan pasu semezam, temekel itjen tua liaw a zaljum.
ch: B:天氣有點熱，我們要多喝水。
en: It’s a bit hot, so we need to drink more water.
How’s the weather outside?

ab: qaca qadaw, paqenetju kiljaungu tua qadaw.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.
How’s the weather outside?

ab: liaw qerepus, neka qadaw i kalevelevan.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.
How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: nutiyaw neka qadaw, liaw qerepus, qaca vali.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.
How was the weather that day?

ab: tazua qadaw pasu ljaljeqel, kavau ta tjiaku nu ljisasaw.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.
How’s the weather on the weekend?
It will be sunny on the weekend.
Will it be rainy that day?

ab: tazua maqadaw a kalevelevan, ika qemudjalj.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.
Will it be rainy that day?

ab: ui, uri qemudjalj nu tazua qadaw.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.
Is it raining now?
The rain stops and the sun comes out.
Is it raining now?

ab: qemudjalj anga, ika namasi ljinay aken.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.
Is it raining outside?

ab: tucu ika qemudjaqudjalj, ljakua pasuvililj ta cengelj uri qemudjalj, kacu tua ljinay.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.
Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: ui, nu icavilj uri ljaljeqel a kaljavuceleljan, kavau tu liaw ta kava.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: tucu a cavilj kisemezam a kaljazalazangan?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: ui, nu kaljazalazangan uri semezam, temekel tjen tu liaw ta zaljum.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.
Do you like spring?

ab: tjenglay ken ta kaljavevuan, semeljec a kalevelevan.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.
Do you like autumn?

ab: ika ken na tjengelay ta kaljaulagan, izua liaw a buhu nu kaljaulagan.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
